TYPE:

LENGTH:

SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable is new in 2024. The Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 caps the copay for a one-month 
supply of insulin on any tier to $35 beginning in 2024. If you get a three-month supply of insulin, your 
costs can not be more than $35 for each month's supply of each covered insulin product. This means 
you'll generally pay no more than $105 for a three-month supply of covered insulin.
